Hovering near a lantern flame, wings dusting the glass with iridescent scale powder
Landing on a windowsill drawn by candlelight, pressing tiny hands against the warm glass
Navigating through darkness by following the glowing trail of her own shed wing-dust
Collecting moonbeams in a tiny bottle, scooping silver light from a puddle's surface
Circling a campfire in tightening spirals as sparks rise around her fluttering wings
Resting on a moth's fuzzy back mid-flight, both drawn toward a distant porch light
Shaking luminous wing-scale dust onto a sleeping flower to coax night-blooming petals open
Drinking nectar from a pale moon-flower, face dusted with silver pollen grains
Weaving a silk cocoon around herself for brief rest, one reflective eye remaining open
Leading a swarm of fireflies in synchronized spirals through dark forest branches
Pressing her enormous reflective eyes close to examine a trembling dewdrop on moss
Launching from a branch into darkness, wing-scales catching and scattering pure moonlight
Fluttering frantically around a streetlamp, leaving swirling patterns of glittering dust clouds
Clinging to a lighthouse beam, wings spread wide as light pulses through translucent membranes
Chasing a falling star across the night sky, arms outstretched toward fading light
Tucking herself into tree bark as an owl's shadow passes overhead, wings folded tight
Sipping dew from a spider's web, careful not to wake the sleeping weaver
Dancing through fog illuminated by distant headlights, wing-dust creating glowing spirals behind her
Grooming her antennae with delicate fingers, reading scents carried on night wind currents
Diving through an open window toward a reading lamp, looping around the glowing bulb
Unfurling her wings to catch warm air rising from a chimney, drifting upward lazily
Perching on a candle's edge to warm her wings, careful to avoid the flickering flame
Spiraling downward through tree canopy following a dropped flashlight's tumbling beam of light
Brushing wing-scales onto mushroom caps, leaving glowing marks that illuminate her forest path
Clinging to a car windshield as it speeds through darkness, mesmerized by dashboard lights within
